events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! The man behind Queen's colossal sound and some of rock's most unforgettable riffs.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young! Sending birthday wishes to the one and only Mick Jagger. Still proving that rock and roll keeps you forever young.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, forever changing the music industry with its 24/7 music video format, famously kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens, changing how we consumed music. Remember the first video ever played?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, launching them into global stardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and Britpop was never the same. What's your favourite track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in music history.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: On the anniversary of his passing, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: King Forever
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, 49 years since we lost the King. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: On the anniversary of his tragic passing, we pay tribute to the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Legacy of Pac
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today. His powerful lyrics and undeniable impact on music still resonate, 30 years on.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: On the anniversary of his death, we remember the groundbreaking guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar work continues to influence musicians worldwide.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on this day in 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. From 'Come Together' to 'Here Comes the Sun', what's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and attitude continue to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that undeniable rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single release (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975, becoming a huge hit.

angles.name: Peace Anthem
angles.copy: 'Imagine' all the people living life in peace... On this day in 1975, John Lennon's powerful message hit the UK charts as a single.

events.title: Apple releases first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple launched the device that put 1,000 songs in your pocket and changed everything.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, of course) to 007 and his incredible cinematic legacy.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the legendary Beatles co-founder, John Lennon.

angles.name: Imagine Forever
angles.copy: Thinking of John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision for peace and his timeless music live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of comedy.
